_description: BIP-39 -> BIP-32 -> BIP-86 derivation known-answer vectors. Pinned to the canonical BIP-86 test mnemonic. The Bitcoin coin-0' output key is the value published in BIP-86 itself (cross-reference proof the @scure/bip32 derivation + TapTweak are correct); the Pearl per-network values are then derived at Pearl's coin types and encoded with Pearl HRPs.
_source: BIP-86 (Key Derivation for Single Key P2TR Outputs) test vectors; node/chaincfg/params.go HDCoinType; protocol-findings.md §8.
mnemonic: abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon about

bip86SpecCrossCheck._note: Canonical BIP-86 receiving address #0 at m/86'/0'/0'/0/0 (Bitcoin coin type 0').

watchOnlyXpub._note: Account-level xpub at m/86'/1'/0' (testnet/regtest coin type 1) and the watch-only child it derives at change/index 0/0. The derived address MUST equal the testnet/regtest mnemonic vector (private and public derivation agree).
